chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 666 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.07.2020 For orders on MA 3066/20 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 3028/20 For hearing of main case Petitioner No.1 namely Mst. Rashida holding CNIC No. 44108- 0567676-6 is present. 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to4. It is the case of the petitioners that Respondent No.8 namely Muhammad Yahya who is personating as an Advocate is actually not a Lawyer. The appropriate and efficacious remedy is available to the Petitioner by moving such application before Sindh Bar Council. This Petition being not maintainable before this Court is dismissed accordingly along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
